'''George Delaney''' (born 4 February 2004) is a professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|pr}} for [[St Helens RLFC|St Helens]] in the [[Super League]].

==Background==
St Helens signed him after he was impressed at the amateur side, Halton Farnworth Hornets.

==Club career==
Delaney made his first team début for [[St Helens RLFC|Saints]] in April 2022 against the [[Castleford Tigers]].<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.yorkshirepost.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/castleford-30-st-helens-10-tired-tigers-good-enough-to-see-off-youthful-champions-3665460|title=Castleford 30 St Helens 10 - Tired Tigers good enough to see off youthful champions|website=Yorkshire Post|accessdate=19 September 2022}}</ref>
Delaney played 18 games for St Helens in the 2023 Super League season as the club finished third on the table. He played in St Helens narrow loss against the Catalans Dragons in the semi-final which stopped them from reaching a fifth successive grand final.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.sthelensstar.co.uk/sport/23856044.paul-wellens-q-saints-review-year-look-2024/|title=Paul Wellens Q&A: Saints review of year and a look to 2024|website=www.sthelensstar.co.uk|date=14 October 2023 }}</ref>
Delaney played 23 matches for St Helens in the 2024 Super League season which saw the club finish sixth on the table, and he was nominated for the Super League Young Player of the Year award.<ref>{{cite web |title=Saints George Delaney on Young Player of Year shortlist |url=https://www.sthelensstar.co.uk/sport/24619559.saints-george-delaney-young-player-league-shortlist/ |website=St Helens Star |access-date=21 July 2025 |date=30 September 2024}}</ref> Delaney played in St Helens golden point extra-time playoff loss against Warrington.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.theguardian.com/sport/2024/sep/28/warrington-st-helens-super-league-eliminator-playoff-rugby-league-match-report/|title=
‘Soul destroying’: Warrington eliminate St Helens in golden drop goal thriller|website=www.theguardian.com}}</ref>

On 10 January 2025, Delaney signed a four-year contract extension to remain at St Helens until the end of 2028.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/articles/cq8k2zjwg3no|title=Saints forward Delaney signs new four-year deal|website=www.bbc.co.uk}}</ref>
Delaney played 27 games for St Helens in the 2025 Super League season including the clubs 20-12 semi-final loss against Hull Kingston Rovers.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/articles/c04q6rqyrv6o/|title=Retiring Waerea-Hargreaves set to miss Grand Final|website=www.bbc.co.uk}}</ref>

==Representative career==
On 9 October 2022, Delaney made his début for the [[England Knights]] in a 28–4 win against [[Scotland national rugby league team|Scotland]].<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.rugby-league.com/article/61050/england-knights-put-scotland-to-the-sword |title=England Knights put Scotland to the sword |website=www.rugby-league.com |date=9 October 2022 |access-date=26 April 2024}}</ref>
